description_long: This chaise features a rectangular, upholstered seat with a tufted pattern, supported by four elegantly curved cabriole legs. The seat is generously padded and covered in a light beige or taupe fabric, with deep button tufting that adds a classic, luxurious touch. The frame and legs are crafted from wood, finished in a light, slightly distressed tone that complements the upholstery. The legs have a traditional, ornate design with gentle curves and subtle decorative details at the feet. There are no visible armrests or backrest, making the chaise suitable for sitting or reclining from either side. Its refined appearance and sturdy construction make it ideal for placement in upscale urban environments such as hotel lobbies, parks, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: An elegant, tufted chaise with a padded rectangular seat and four curved wooden cabriole legs, finished in light tones. The design is classic and refined, with no backrest or armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the tufted seat and the ornate cabriole legs, highlighting the symmetrical design and button detailing.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the chaise's length, the depth of the tufted upholstery, and the graceful curve of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same tufted seat and leg design, confirming the symmetrical construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the chaise's length and the elegant curvature of the legs, with the tufted seat surface visible.
attribute_backrest_design: There is no visible backrest on this chaise; the seat is open and flat on all sides, allowing access from any direction.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are cabriole-style, made of wood with a light finish, featuring elegant curves and subtle decorative flourishes at the feet.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored with a deep button-tufted pattern, creating a quilted, plush surface across the entire seat.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached cushion that spans the entire seat area, with no separate or loose cushions visible.
